body: BEGIN CASE WHEN x > 0 THEN y := 1; END CASE; END

comment: searched CASE with multiple WHEN and ELSE
body: BEGIN CASE WHEN x > 0 THEN y := 1; WHEN x < 0 THEN y := 2; ELSE y := 0; END CASE; END
BEGIN CASE x WHEN 1 THEN y := 1; END CASE; END

comment: simple CASE with multiple WHEN and ELSE

body: BEGIN LOOP CASE WHEN done THEN EXIT; ELSE x := x + 1; END CASE; END LOOP; END

comment: empty ELSE is preserved (distinct from no ELSE, unlike IF)
